steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage explains robots are designed “so that people will find it easier to interact with them”—establishing that bipedal features should strengthen, not weaken, people's feelings of comfort.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Buttress (to support or strengthen) directly fills the blank: helping to buttress comfort means reinforcing that feeling to make interaction easier. All three other choices undermine this goal by diminishing, restricting, or rejecting rather than supporting. That matches choice D — D is correct.
